owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.ipfsCid: CID del metadata JSON en IPFS
params.scoreSig: Firma ECDSA del backend sobre (fingerprintHash, authenticityScore, sender)
params.soulbound: Si true, el NFT es intransferible

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

assetContract().notice: Contrato NFT que mintea los certificados

registerWork(bytes32,string,uint256,bool.notice: Registra una obra musical on-chain y mintea un NFT certificado.

registrationFee().notice: Precio de registro (0 por defecto, configurable)

scoreSigner().notice: Dirección del backend que firma los authenticityScores Si es address(0), la verificación de firma está desactivada (solo dev)
